title: Manage agricultural crop production
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage agricultural crop production demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine requirements for an agricultural crop establishment program

pcs.text: Select plant varieties best suited to soil, climate, seasonal conditions and marketing goals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select plant varieties best suited to soil, climate, seasonal conditions and marketing goals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select plant varieties best suited to soil, climate, seasonal conditions and marketing goals.

pcs.text: Determine available soil moisture and water requirement for crop
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine available soil moisture and water requirement for crop?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine available soil moisture and water requirement for crop.

pcs.text: Assess available water reserves and develop a water management plan for crop production
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess available water reserves and develop a water management plan for crop production?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess available water reserves and develop a water management plan for crop production.

pcs.text: Determine crop nutrient requirements to achieve required yield according to environmental procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine crop nutrient requirements to achieve required yield according to environmental procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine crop nutrient requirements to achieve required yield according to environmental procedures.

pcs.text: Determine fertiliser program from crop nutrient requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine fertiliser program from crop nutrient requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine fertiliser program from crop nutrient requirements.

pcs.text: Assess technology to ensure most efficient performance of operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess technology to ensure most efficient performance of operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess technology to ensure most efficient performance of operations.

pcs.text: Identify and maintain budgetary requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and maintain budgetary requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and maintain budgetary requirements.

pcs.text: Develop a crop establishment program according to crop production plan

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a crop establishment program according to crop production plan.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, assess risk and develop and implement controls procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risk and develop and implement controls procedures.
